creative_brief: Split-screen map animation: left side shows a tangled 2,400km red route through warehouses; right side shows a clean, short green line from a named NSW farm region to the Brookvale hub. End frame: FarmThru logo with 'Own a piece of it.'
primary_text:
If your grocery travels 2,400km before it reaches you, someone's paying for every kilometre.

That someone is you. And the farmer growing it.

FarmThru connects NSW families directly with partner farms across the state. No warehouses. No wholesalers. Just food that travels a fraction of the distance.

Our Brookvale hub is open Monday to Friday. No subscription. No lock-in. Order when you want.

We're building something that could reshape how Sydney eats. You can own a piece of it.
headline: Shorter supply chain. You can own it.
description: Farm-direct grocery, hub-and-collect from Brookvale. Be part of what comes next.
